chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1686 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection No.2 2.For hearing of CMA No.8353/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 05.05.2025 Mr.Ghulam Nabi Shar, Advocate for the Petitioners. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Amir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Respondent. Learned counsel for the petitioners has filed a statement which is taken on record. He places on record a show cause notice dated 30.04.2025 and states that since a show cause notice has been issued, the petitioners shall contest the same before the issuing authority. He seeks that the notice be adjudicated vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending aforesaid no further coercive action be taken their against. Learned counsel for the Respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and he states that this petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
